name: Alessio

skills.name: Rebellious Little Hawk
skills.description: Alessio's Basic Attacks deal area damage, plus extra physical damage.

skills.name: Upgraded Shell
skills.description: Enhances his next 3 Basic Attacks, which deal extra physical damage in a greater area.

skills.name: Legendary Hero Debut
skills.description: Throws a smoke bomb, creating a cloud of smoke that grants Stealth toteammates within it, including himself. The bomb's explosion sends himairborne, and his Basic Attacks allow him to stay airborne longer.

skills.name: Sunset Fireworks Show
skills.description: Leaps into the air and fires several shells, each shell dealing physical damage to the target in the area. Up to 1 enemy can take a shell for the target.

tips: Alessio is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 51.5% win rate and 0.9% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Sparkforged Dagger → Boots of Dexterity → Eternity Blade → Bloodweeper → Shadow Ripper → Daybreaker's Virtue.
Run Dominator for stats that match Alessio's Marksman kit. Take Haste & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Upgraded Shell → Legendary Hero Debut → Sunset Fireworks Show → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
Teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
Alessio excels into Mai Shiranui, Lian Po. Avoid blind picking into Arke, Lady Sun without team peel.

Alessio is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.5% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.9% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Alessio.

faqs.question: Is Alessio good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Alessio is Tier A Marksman with 51.5% win rate, 0.9% pick rate, and 0.0% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Solid situational pick.

faqs.question: What is the best Alessio build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Sparkforged Dagger, Boots of Dexterity, Eternity Blade, Bloodweeper, Shadow Ripper, Daybreaker's Virtue. Run Dominator arcana with Haste & Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Alessio?
faqs.answer: Pick Arke, Lady Sun into Alessio. Deny Farm Lane resources early and force fights before Alessio completes core items. Alessio struggles when the enemy can dive and burst them.

faqs.question: Who does Alessio counter?
faqs.answer: Alessio is strong into Mai Shiranui, Lian Po according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Alessio when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Farm Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Alessio good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Alessio is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.5% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.9% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Alessio.

faqs.question: What lane should Alessio play?
faqs.answer: Alessio is tagged Farm Lane in Camp export (Marksman). Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Alessio?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Dominator arcana. Battle spell: Haste & Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Alessio or Hou Yi — which is better?
faqs.answer: Alessio vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Alessio has +2.2% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Alessio when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Alessio?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.0%). Focus bans on higher-tier Marksman picks unless targeting a one-trick.
